basic_details.short_information: J&K Development Finance Corporation Ltd. (JKDFC) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Manager (Legal). Candidates with LLB Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 19-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through JKDFC official website jkdfc.org.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for JKDFC Manager (Legal) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
